Post job

For hiring teams

Hire a video editor

Send a specific recurring workflow: what you publish, how often, what raw footage exists, what clips you need, and how notes will be handled.

What we collect

  • Role type, budget, and timeline
  • Content format and workflow
  • References, software, and review process
  • Consent for follow-up and editor matches

Write the brief editors need

A specific brief gets better responses. Editors need to know the format, volume, budget, tools, review process, deadline, and examples of the style you want.

  1. Submit the form.
  2. Your row lands in the right Google Sheet tab once the endpoint is configured.
  3. We use the sheet as the early matching queue.

Submissions are routed to the Hiring Requests sheet when the Google Apps Script endpoint is configured.

Useful guides

For teams hiring editors

Editors

Where to find video editor jobs

The best video editor opportunities are split across job boards, private communities, creator teams, agencies, referrals, and local production networks.
Hiring teams

How to hire a video editor

The fastest way to hire a strong editor is to write a brief that filters for the actual workflow, not just taste.
Hiring teams

Video editor job description template

Most editing job posts are too vague. This structure helps editors self-select before either side wastes time.
Video Editor Jobs

A focused editor community and hiring intake surface for recurring video work.
